scripts.deploy:worker:build: MICHELIN_BASE_PATH=/michelin/ npm run build && node scripts/build-cloudflare-worker.mjs
scripts.deploy:worker:publish: npm run deploy:worker:build && npx --yes wrangler@latest deploy cloudflare/michelin-worker/worker.mjs --name michelin-list --compatibility-date 2026-05-22 --route 'restaurant.zjz.world/michelin*' --route 'restaurant.zjz.world/black-pearl*'
scripts.test: node scripts/verify-data.mjs && npm run db:build && npm run db:verify && node scripts/verify-db-api.mjs && node scripts/verify-amap-runtime.mjs && node scripts/verify-app-layout.mjs && node scripts/verify-offline-support.mjs && npm run deploy:worker:build && node scripts/verify-production-preview.mjs
scripts.test:db: npm run db:build && npm run db:verify
